data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Button sizes and placements are optimized for efficient user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Ensures critical actions are easily accessible and clickable.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified navigation reduces decision-making time for users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options and guided recommendations.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information chunking aids user comprehension and retention.
data.technical_spec: Content curation and categorization for easy consumption.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistency with familiar design patterns to enhance ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Universal design elements in line with user expectations.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complexity is managed to balance feature richness and usability.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive user interfaces with guided interactions.
